name: rldyour-rules
description: Quality-first engineering rules for Codex: clean architecture, implementation discipline, dependency compatibility, verification gates, agent-only file policy, ADRs, and ry-rules-review.

interface.longDescription: This plugin defines the owner's engineering rules for Codex. It provides automatic skills for quality-first implementation, architecture boundaries, implementation discipline, dependency and compatibility policy, verification gates, project instruction documentation for Codex AGENTS.md and Claude Code .claude/CLAUDE.md, agent-only file policy, and explicit ry-rules-review. The rules are advisory-first but non-negotiable for hard bans such as hacks, temporary workarounds, swallowed errors, secrets, and fake checks. User-facing conversation stays Russian; repository artifacts stay English.
defaultPrompt: Use $ry-rules-review to audit the current diff against rldyour rules.
